codeReview.summary: The README-only change covers the assigned auth-doc refresh requirements: local proxy client credentials are separated from upstream credentials, Z.AI API-key and auth-file usage is documented with Coding Plan defaults and placeholders, and OpenCode Zen/Go remain OpenAI-compatible chat-completions-only examples. I found no blocking or non-blocking correctness issues in the reviewed diff.

summary: Reviewed feature provider-auth-docs-refresh at commit 30117be5590e40fc8ab19399d8466658b49a3aff.
